title: chrysanthemum persicum
intro: Chrysanthemum persicum, also known as the Shandong chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum persicum include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and improving respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Chrysanthemum persicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal tonics and remedies.
